archetype: Vibrant Play / Conceptual Sketch (Archetype 6 + Sketch Brutalism)
emotion_and_tone: Playful, tactile, unrestricted, and nostalgic. Evokes the feeling of doodling in a sketchbook with ink pens and highlighters. Avoids typical 'AI-slop' aesthetics by grounding the UI in physical, paper-like reality.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous, asymmetrical, organic. Elements should feel placed by hand, not perfectly aligned by a machine.

patterns.hero: Asymmetrical split or overlapping bento layout. Use overlapping images resembling polaroids or sketchbook pages taped to the background.
patterns.editor: Control Room Grid. Sidebar for AI prompt/controls (col-span-1), Main canvas for comic panels (col-span-3).
patterns.comic_grid: Classic 4-6 panel (CSS Grid) OR Webtoon vertical scroll (Flex col) depending on user toggle.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Solid background (#FFFFFF) with a 2px-3px solid ink border (#111111). Hard offset shadow (e.g., shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#111111]) to mimic 2.5D paper cutouts.

buttons.primary: Highlighter yellow background, 2px solid black border, hard offset shadow. On hover/active, the shadow compresses (translate-y-1 translate-x-1 shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_#111111]) for a tactile button press feel.
buttons.secondary: Marker blue or paper white background, same border and shadow behavior.

surfaces_and_components.inputs: Solid white background, 2px solid black border, handwritten placeholder text style if possible. Focus state: ring-0, border changes to Accent Pink or Primary Yellow with a slight rotation (-rotate-1).
surfaces_and_components.modals: Opaque white background with thick ink borders, hard shadow, and perhaps a stylized 'tape' element visually holding it to the screen.
surfaces_and_components.icons: Use 'lucide-react' but customized with stroke-width 2.5 to look like marker drawings, or install 'iconoir-react' for a rougher, sketchier aesthetic.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Spring-based transforms. Elements should subtly tilt (rotate-1 to -rotate-2) on hover to feel like physical paper being moved.
motion_and_interaction.page_load: Staggered fade-up with slight rotation for cards. Let Framer Motion add a 'bouncy' spring configuration (stiffness: 300, damping: 20).

media_and_assets.rules: Never use placeholder images. Images should reflect ink sketches, comic halftones, or creative scribble art.

hero_background_texture.description: Wrinkled paper texture for the overall app background or hero wrapper.

halftone_accent.description: Halftone dots pattern to be used as a CSS mask or background layer overlay.

hero_sketch_1.description: Expressive abstract art with bold black strokes to decorate the hero area.

comic_example_1.description: Sketch of a woman in a notebook, use as an example in the 'My Comics' gallery.

comic_example_2.description: Caricature drawing in progress, use as an example in the 'My Comics' gallery.

google_logo.description: Standard Google G logo for the auth button.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page layout to achieve the asymmetrical, overlapping 'scrapbook' aesthetic.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Customize Shadcn components (buttons, inputs, dialogs) by overriding their default styles: add `border-2 border-black`, hard shadows `shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#111111]`, and rounded corners.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Implement Framer Motion for bouncy, tactile interactions (hover rotation, active shadow compression).
instructions_to_main_agent.4: In the Comic Creator editor, provide a clear UI toggle (e.g., Tabs) between 'Grid Layout' (CSS Grid, 2x2 or 3x2 panels) and 'Webtoon Layout' (flex-col, 100% width panels stacking vertically).
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do not use 'Inter' font. Import 'Caveat Brush' and 'Nunito' from Google Fonts in the HTML head or CSS.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
